basic_details.job_title: TCIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Resident Engineer, System Security Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Resident Engineer, System Security Officer and More
basic_details.short_information: Telecommunications Consultants India Ltd. (TCIL) Various Technical Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 28 April 2026 on the official website www.tcil.net.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the TCIL Various Technical Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 40 years.

qualification.details: System Administrator / Network Administrator, System Security Officer, Certifying Authority (CA) Administrator, Resident Engineer: B.Tech (CS/IT/EC) / MCA / M.Sc (IT/CS/EC) full time from a recognized University/Institute.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TCIL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.tcil.net.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for TCIL Recruitment 2026 is 12th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for TCIL Various Technical Posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a full-time B.Tech in CS/IT/EC, MCA, or M.Sc in IT/CS/EC from a recognized University or Institute to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the TCIL recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under TCIL Recruitment 2026 is 40 years. Age relaxation details, if any, will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies available for various technical posts in Telecommunications Consultants India Ltd. (TCIL) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for TCIL Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the given address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the TCIL technical posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will range from Rs. 33,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for TCIL Recruitment 2026 will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the TCIL Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for TCIL Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of TCIL. A link to the notification is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of job portals.

faq.question: Q10. What are the specific posts advertised in TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The specific posts advertised are System Administrator / Network Administrator (2 vacancies), System Security Officer (1 vacancy), Certifying Authority (CA) Administrator (1 vacancy), and Resident Engineer (2 vacancies).
